Buy for $9 (Reg. $10)

What we love

If you or a family member still doesn’t have a way to secure your phone to the dash, I recommend you give this solution a peek. Adding MagSafe to my car’s dashboard is a move I have yet to regret. I use it religiously and think it’s safer to have my phone locked in place so I won’t have to fumble for it later on.
